stemHtml:
An aircraft planning to fly a total distance of 460 NM, after flying for 1 hour 09 minutes it covers 178 NM and its actual fuel remaining is 1019 I. Given the following information and assuming that the actual fuel consumption remains at the same rate, what will be the actual fuel remaining at destination?

Average TAS: 145 kt
Average wind component: 25 kt headwind
Trip Fuel: 1350 l
Planned average fuel flow: 360 l/h
